name: tal
description: Common plugin for git workflows, PR feedback, and CI troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Git, PR, and CI workflows packaged for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides reusable workflows for commits, PR feedback, App Store Connect, and debugging common engineering tasks in a shared team style.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an atomic commit from the changes in this repo.
Collect PR feedback and summarize the actions needed.
Help me debug this CI failure.
